# Self-Improvement Tasks — ~/.claude Configuration

## Should fix (Warning)

- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md:84` — Implementation-row parenthetical still reads
  `sonnet (claude-sonnet-4-6)`; the `sonnet` alias now resolves to Sonnet 5.
  Fix: change to `sonnet (claude-sonnet-5)`. Optionally note the row can now run
  `xhigh` effort (Sonnet 5 is the first Sonnet-tier model to support it) and that
  Sonnet 5 reaches near-Opus-4.8 quality on coding/agentic work.

- [ ] `rules/extended-thinking.md:37` — "Do NOT use `budget_tokens` — deprecated on
  Sonnet 4.6, removed on Opus 4.8." On Sonnet 5 `budget_tokens` is **removed (400)**,
  not deprecated. Fix: "…removed on Opus 4.8 and Sonnet 5 (400); deprecated on
  Opus 4.6 / Sonnet 4.6."

## Consider improving (Suggestion)

- [ ] `rules/extended-thinking.md:33` — "Default is `high` on Opus 4.8 and Sonnet 4.6;
  `xhigh` on Opus 4.7." Fix: add Sonnet 5 — default `high`, and it supports the full
  `low`/`medium`/`high`/`xhigh`/`max` range (first Sonnet tier with `xhigh`/`max`).

- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` (Model Selection table + surrounding prose) — with
  Sonnet 5 ≈ Opus 4.8 on coding/agentic at 60% of Opus token cost, the Opus-vs-Sonnet
  routing calculus shifts. Fix: add one line noting Sonnet 5 now covers most
  implementation *and* much routine agentic work; reserve Opus 4.8 for the deepest
  multi-path reasoning / longest-horizon autonomous runs. Keep the default-to-Sonnet
  guidance — it's now stronger, not weaker.

- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md:92` — ">Extended thinking is **deprecated on Sonnet 4.6
  and removed on `claude-opus-4-8`**." Reword to include Sonnet 5 in the "removed"
  set (budget_tokens 400s there too), consistent with the extended-thinking.md fix.

## Inline comments to add (Notes)

- [ ] `skills/self-improve/SKILL.md:133` — the Agent B pre-seeded "Full Anthropic API
  model IDs" list names `claude-sonnet-4-6`. Update to `claude-sonnet-5` so future
  self-improve runs don't re-flag the current alias as stale (both IDs are valid; the
  point is that `sonnet` now resolves to Sonnet 5).

- [ ] `skills/self-improve/SKILL.md:142-144` — Agent B effort table rows list
  "Sonnet 4.6". Add a Sonnet 5 note: supports `low`–`max` including `xhigh`
  (Sonnet 4.6 tops out at `high` default; Sonnet 5 adds `xhigh`/`max`).

- [ ] `rules/prompting-quality.md` (Agent context budget / file-inventory caps) — the
  Sonnet 5 tokenizer emits ~30% more tokens than Sonnet 4.6 for the same text, so
  effective context fills faster. The 20-30-file cap is count-based and still fine, but
  add: `// Sonnet 5 tokenizer ~1.3x Sonnet 4.6 token count — budget context accordingly.`
